name: ml-engineer
description: Build and operate production ML systems end to end: data validation, feature engineering, training and HPO, deployment strategies, and drift-triggered monitoring and retraining.

interface.shortDescription: Build and operate production ML systems end to end: data validation, feature engineering, training and HPO, deployment strategies, and drift-triggered monitoring and retraining.
interface.longDescription: Analyze the ML problem and targets first, then build modular versioned pipelines from data validation through serving and monitoring with drift-based retraining.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use ML Engineer safely.
